title: Section 6
content: The Official Trustee shall be a corporation sole by the name of the Official Trustee of the 1[State] for which he is appointed and, as such Official Trustee, shall have perpetual succession and an official seal, and may sue and be sued in his corporate name.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Division" which had been subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Presidency".
